body: Following the edits in https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/29770 last year (June 2025), the current tree under 'protein O-linked glycosylation' looks like this: However, is seems that one of the new terms requested in https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/29770 was not made: **protein O-linked glycosylation via N-acetylglucosamine** (referred to as 'protein O-linked GlcNAcylation' in https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/29770) This term is needed to annotate fly Ogt and Eogt (see https://flybase.org/reports/FBgg0002104) and orthologs. The term was also requested back in 2022 in #23575, but it was not made then because "This corresponds to the MF protein GO:0097363 O-acetylglucosaminyltransferase activity, since it is a single reaction." It's true that adding GlcNAc is a single-step event and the sugar isn't further extended - the process is actually reversible and seems more similar to phosphorylation than the other O-linked glycosylations (see PMID: 35536957). Nonetheless, I think we need a distinct BP term for this so that the relevant genes can be annotated to same level of granularity as (and thus be distinguished from) the current sister terms. (Currently, Ogt/Eogt are annotated to the generic parent term 'protein O-linked glycosylation') * **Suggested term label:** protein O-linked glycosylation via N-acetylglucosamine * **Definition (free text)** A glycoprotein biosynthetic process in which a single N-acetylglucosamine is covalently linked via a beta-glycosidic bond to the oxygen atom of a serine or threonine side chain in a protein, resulting in the formation of a protein O-linked glycan. The sugar is not elongated into a larger oligosaccharide chain. * **Reference, in format PMID:#######** PMID: 35536957 * **Gene product name and ID to be annotated to this term** Dmel Ogt and Eogt, and orthologs * **Parent term(s)** protein O-linked glycosylation * **Synonyms (please specify, EXACT, BROAD, NARROW or RELATED)** protein O-linked GlcNAcylation [EXACT] protein O-linked-N-acetylglucosaminylation [EXACT] * **Any other information**
title: NTR: protein O-linked glycosylation via N-acetylglucosamine
